hero.subtext: From mobile apps to metaverse development, we craft cutting-edge solutions that transform ideas into reality. Your vision, our expertise.

about.heading: Crafting
about.desc: At vebx.run, we're more than developers — we're digital architects. We combine creative vision with technical mastery to build products that don't just work, they inspire. From startups to enterprises, we bring your boldest ideas to life.
about.heroDesc: At vebx.run, we're more than developers — we're digital architects. We combine creative vision with technical mastery to build products that don't just work, they inspire.

features.innovationDesc: Cutting-edge tech stack for modern solutions

about.fromStartupsDesc1: Founded with a mission to democratize cutting-edge technology, vebx.run has grown into a global digital agency serving clients across industries. We bring your boldest ideas to life with precision and passion.
about.fromStartupsDesc2: Our team of seasoned professionals spans across mobile development, web platforms, metaverse experiences, game design, and beyond. We don't just build software — we engineer digital futures.

values.creativeDesc: We approach every project with fresh perspectives, challenging conventional solutions to deliver truly innovative results.
values.qualityDesc: Every line of code, every pixel, every interaction is crafted to the highest standards of quality and performance.
values.globalDesc: Serving clients across the globe with culturally aware, locally relevant digital solutions.
values.clientDesc: Your success is our success. We build lasting partnerships based on trust, transparency, and shared goals.

contact.subject: Subject

expertise.heading: Our
expertise.desc: We master the tools that matter. Our expertise spans across the entire digital ecosystem.
expertise.ctaDesc: Have a project in mind? Our team of experts is ready to bring your vision to life.

ourWork.heading: Our
ourWork.desc: A showcase of projects that demonstrate our expertise across industries and technologies.

emaanai.title: Emaan Ai
emaanai.desc: Islamic app for Android and iOS with a green-branded experience, prayer times, Quran, and an analytics dashboard for engagement insights.

vebxcode.title: Vebxcode
vebxcode.desc: Full portfolio website for a digital agency — dark theme, red accents, services, project gallery, achievements, blog, and contact. Built to showcase their work and expertise.

healthsync.title: HealthSync
healthsync.desc: Doctor-patient portal for appointments, prescriptions, and medical records. HIPAA-aligned, used by clinics for scheduling and follow-ups.

taskflow.title: TaskFlow
taskflow.desc: Team task management with Kanban boards, deadlines, and real-time sync. Deployed for remote teams and agencies.

fooddash.title: FoodDash
fooddash.desc: Restaurant discovery, online ordering, and live delivery tracking. Partner app for restaurants and driver app for logistics.

eventify.title: Eventify
eventify.desc: Event ticketing and venue booking platform with payment, attendee management, and QR check-in. Used for conferences and workshops.

docvault.title: DocVault
docvault.desc: Secure document storage with e-sign, version history, and compliance controls. Built for legal and finance teams.

fittrack.title: FitTrack
fittrack.desc: Fitness and health tracking app with workout plans, progress dashboards, and nutrition logging. Cross-platform for Android and iOS.

cloudflow.title: CloudFlow
cloudflow.desc: Project management and workflow SaaS platform with real-time collaboration, task boards, and team analytics for remote teams.

neondrift.title: Neon Drift
neondrift.desc: Arcade-style racing game with neon aesthetics, smooth controls, and leaderboards. Built with Unity for multiple platforms.

shopverse.title: ShopVerse
shopverse.desc: Modern e-commerce platform with product catalog, cart, checkout, and vendor dashboard. Integrated payments and inventory.

paybridge.title: PayBridge
paybridge.desc: Payment and finance dashboard for businesses — transactions, reconciliation, and reporting with bank-grade security.

learnhub.title: LearnHub
learnhub.desc: Learning management platform with courses, progress tracking, quizzes, and certificates for educators and learners.

smartops.title: SmartOps
smartops.desc: IoT-powered operations dashboard for monitoring assets, alerts, and analytics. Built for smart facilities and logistics.

engagelab.title: EngageLab
engagelab.desc: Social media and campaign analytics platform — engagement metrics, content scheduling, and ROI reporting for brands.

ourWork.ctaDesc: Let's discuss your project and create something extraordinary together.

privacy.heading: Privacy
privacy.section1: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and project details when you contact us or use our services. We also automatically collect certain information about your device and how you interact with our website.
privacy.section2: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, communicate with you about projects and updates, and ensure the security of our platforms.
privacy.section3: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our website and conducting our business.
privacy.section4: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.section5: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also opt out of marketing communications at any time by contacting us at support@vebx.run.
privacy.section6: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
